title: Mess Boulanger

{{Quote|Many think it's valor, planning, the offensive spirit that wins battles, sir, but I say, 'Pish!' I'll tell you what wins battles, sir. It's logistics!|Mess Boulanger lectures Anakin Skywalker|<ref name="JT" />}}
'''Mess Boulanger''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] as a [[Quartermaster/Legends|quartermaster]]. Boulanger participated in the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]], providing logistical support to the liberation of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Intergalactic Communications Center]] from a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] occupation force.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Remember this—COMETS-Q! Yessir, it's COMETS-Q that gets you to the battlefield, sustains you once you're there, and gets you home again. That's the combat-support branches of modern warfare, sir: Chemical, Ordnance, Medical, Engineering, Transport, Signal, and Quartermaster.|Mess Boulanger shares a useful acronym|<ref name="JT" />}}
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] Mess Boulanger was assigned to the post of [[Quartermaster/Legends|quartermaster]] within a [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Republic military]] expedition dispatched to [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]], where a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Intergalactic Communications Center|listening post]] had come under [[Battle of Praesitlyn|attack]] from a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] taskforce led by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Pors Tonith/Legends|Pors Tonith]]. Traveling to Praesitlyn with a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] detachment under the command of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Nejaa Halcyon]], Boulanger meticulously planned and prepared the necessary supplies well in advance of battle and thoroughly briefed [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] on the importance of logistics.<ref name="JT" />

While on Praesitlyn during the Republic incursion, Boulanger encountered [[Zozridor Slayke]], the leader of a [[Sons and Daughters of Freedom|pro-Republic splinter group]] that had been fighting against the Separatist occupation force. Slayke mistook Boulanger for the General in charge of the relief effort, prompting Boulanger to indicate Commander Skywalker as a more suitable contact. As the fighting intensified, Boulanger took charge of the supply chain, directing the [[Transport/Legends|transports]] carrying provisions to and from Praesitlyn and having several troopships modified to serve as cargo carriers to deal with the sheer amount of supplies, which Boulanger and his staff had planned to last for the estimated [[Standard week/Legends|week]] needed to unseat Tonith's grip on the communications facility. Despite the quartermaster's best efforts, persistent attacks from Tonith's forces meant that Boulanger's [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] had to negotiate ever more hazardous conditions to land on Praesitlyn, resulting in many of the ships being destroyed.<ref name="JT" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|No one ever asks me questions about my work. That's because they don't have to. I'm good at what I do.|Mess Boulanger endorses himself|<ref name="JT" />}}
Mess Boulanger was a logistician at heart; his dedication to ensuring that the Republic expedition to Praesitlyn was adequately supplied was absolute, and he took great pride in informing others of that fact, espousing the use of the acronym [[COMETS-Q]] to help remind others of what a military force needed to function adequately. As a quartermaster specialising in the supply and support of an organic army, Boulanger was disdainful of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], though he freely admitted that managing provisions for droids, such as spare parts and lubricants, also counted as logistics. An older male Human, Boulanger had a pot belly, [[Color/Legends|blue]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and a drooping brown [[Hair/Legends|mustache]].<ref name="JT" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mess Boulanger first appeared in ''[[Jedi Trial]]'', a novel written by [[David Sherman]] and [[Dan Cragg]] and released in [[2004]] as part of the [[Clone Wars multimedia project|''Clone Wars'' multimedia project]].<ref name="JT" />
